title: The Famous Sword Bijomaru
actors: Shôtarô Hanayagi, Kan Ishii, Eijirô Yanagi
plot: Kiyone Sakurai, an apprentice swordmaker makes a sword for his guardian, Kozaemon Onoda. Onoda breaks the sword while defending his lord which eventually leads to his death at the hands of Naito, when Naito demands to marry his da...
